text:
Owner-curated BightBound resource
The supplied directory recommends BightBound as an Austin-area resource for intermediate and advanced rope education: https://www.bightbound.com/.
BightBound's inspected FAQ says its teaching emphasizes fundamentals and the reasons behind them, then uses rope as play involving interaction, connection, and shared emotion. It describes its tying style as chaotic, fluid, sadistic, and abstract, and says it generally uses Western terminology while still teaching the function and history of techniques.
title: Owner-curated BightBound resource
